controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks: concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks:
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks: concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as 'rrb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as 'RRB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as 'rrb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of paid-up capital, statutory reserve, other free reserves not in the nature of outside liabilities and credit balance in profit and loss acc
controls.control_description:
(1) "Owned Funds" shall comprise of paid-up capital, statutory reserve, other free reserves
not in the nature of outside liabilities and credit balance in profit and loss account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of paid-up capital, statutory reserve, other free reserves not in the nature of outside liabilities and credit balance in profit and loss acc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include share capital deposit / additional share capital (provided to rrbs selected under restructuring programme) contributions received from ce
controls.control_description:
It
<image>
shall also include share capital deposit / additional share capital (provided to RRBs
selected under restructuring programme) contributions received from Central
Government and sponsor banks (even in cases where State Government's
contributions are awaited) for the computation of owned funds on a notional basis only
for the purpose of computing exposure limit for advances / investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include share capital deposit / additional share capital (provided to rrbs selected under restructuring programme) contributions received from ce

controls.control_objective: To ensure include: • accumulated losses and shortfall in provisions
controls.control_description:
It shall not include:
• accumulated losses and shortfall in provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include: • accumulated losses and shortfall in provisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in owned funds
controls.control_description:
should
not be included in owned funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in owned funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure include both credit (funded and non-funded credit limits and underwriting and similar commitments) and investment exposures
controls.control_description:
(2) "Exposure" shall include both credit (funded and non-funded credit limits and
underwriting and similar commitments) and investment exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include both credit (funded and non-funded credit limits and underwriting and similar commitments) and investment exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit
controls.control_description:
For credit exposure,
the sanctioned limits or outstanding whichever is higher shall be reckoned for arriving
at the exposure limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding for arriving at credit exposure limit
controls.control_description:
Further, in case of fully drawn term loans, where there is no scope
of re-drawal of any portion of the sanctioned limit, RRBs may reckon the outstanding for
arriving at credit exposure limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to reckon the outstanding for arriving at credit exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reckoned at 100 per cent of the non-fund based credit limits, or outstanding, whichever is higher
controls.control_description:
Non-fund-based exposures should also be reckoned at
100 per cent of the non-fund based credit limits, or outstanding, whichever is higher.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reckoned at 100 per cent of the non-fund based credit limits, or outstanding, whichever is higher

controls.control_objective: To ensure be requiring substantially higher credit facilities, rrbs may not be financing them
controls.control_description:
(3) "Group borrowers": As group borrowers may be requiring substantially higher credit
facilities, RRBs may not be financing them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be requiring substantially higher credit facilities, rrbs may not be financing them

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish a framework for identifying group borrowers based on relevant information available with it
controls.control_description:
However, where such finance is extended
to group borrowers directly, an RRB shall establish a framework for identifying group
borrowers based on relevant information available with it.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to establish a framework for identifying group borrowers based on relevant information available with it

controls.control_objective: To ensure a bank by which such regional rural bank has been sponsored
controls.control_description:
(4) "Sponsor Bank" means a bank by which such Regional Rural Bank has been
sponsored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a bank by which such regional rural bank has been sponsored

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the regional rura
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or the Regional Rural Banks Act, 1976 and rules / regulations made thereunder,
or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the regional rura

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a set of written loan policies
controls.control_description: The RRB shall develop a set of written loan policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop a set of written loan policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, specify explicitly single counterparty and group exposure limits, standards for documentation, sectoral exposure limits and delegation o
controls.control_description:
Such policies should, inter alia,
specify explicitly single counterparty and group exposure limits, standards for
documentation, sectoral exposure limits and delegation of powers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, specify explicitly single counterparty and group exposure limits, standards for documentation, sectoral exposure limits and delegation o

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the position of diversification of lending portfolios
controls.control_description:
The Board shall review
the position of diversification of lending portfolios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the position of diversification of lending portfolios

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 15 per cent and 40 per cent of its owned funds, respectively
controls.control_description:
The RRB's exposure to a single and group borrower / party (i.e., single exposure and
group exposure) shall not be higher than 15 per cent and 40 per cent of its owned funds,
respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 15 per cent and 40 per cent of its owned funds, respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate its lending programme focussing on reaching a large number of relatively smaller borrowers, while ensuring suitable diversification of its l
controls.control_description:
The RRB shall formulate its lending programme focussing on reaching a large number
of relatively smaller borrowers, while ensuring suitable diversification of its lending
portfolios, in order to obviate concentration of risk in a single / group of borrowers or line of
activity etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate its lending programme focussing on reaching a large number of relatively smaller borrowers, while ensuring suitable diversification of its l

controls.control_objective: To ensure also suitably review the position to ensure compliance
controls.control_description:
The Boards of RRBs shall also suitably review the position to ensure
compliance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also suitably review the position to ensure compliance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 10 per cent of its owned funds
controls.control_description:
The RRB's investment in Tier-II Bonds issued by its sponsor bank or other banks / FIs
shall not be higher than 10 per cent of its owned funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 10 per cent of its owned funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 5 per cent of the incremental deposits at the end of the preceding financial year including buying the shares / debentures from the sec
controls.control_description:
The RRB's investment in shares and debentures of corporates and units of mutual
funds shall not be higher than 5 per cent of the incremental deposits at the end of the
preceding financial year including buying the shares / debentures from the secondary
market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 5 per cent of the incremental deposits at the end of the preceding financial year including buying the shares / debentures from the sec

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with
controls.control_description:
While making investments in a company, provisions of Sections 19(2) of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 shall be complied with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest its non-slr surplus funds in risk-sharing participation certificates (pcs) issued by sponsor banks on agreed terms subject to the exposure ceil
controls.control_description:
The RRB may invest its non-SLR surplus funds in risk-sharing participation certificates
(PCs) issued by sponsor banks on agreed terms subject to the exposure ceilings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest its non-slr surplus funds in risk-sharing participation certificates (pcs) issued by sponsor banks on agreed terms subject to the exposure ceil

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the overall ceiling of 15 per cent of fresh lending during a year fixed for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Further,
<image>
PCs shall be within the overall ceiling of 15 per cent of fresh lending during a year fixed for
the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within the overall ceiling of 15 per cent of fresh lending during a year fixed for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure review their extant sectoral exposure limits for consumer credit and put in place
controls.control_description:
The RRB shall review their extant sectoral exposure limits for consumer credit and put
in place, if not already there, Board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments
under consumer credit as may be considered necessary by the Boards as part of prudent
risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review their extant sectoral exposure limits for consumer credit and put in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures
controls.control_description:
In particular, limits shall be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee
controls.control_description:
The limits so fixed shall be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing
basis by the Risk Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes
controls.control_description:
All top-up loans extended by RRBs against movable assets which are inherently
depreciating in nature, such as vehicles, shall be treated as unsecured loans for credit
appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the
issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
